narrative:
Precinct Salt Creek (precinct in Muskingum County) has 818 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
